after_semantics: Official entry: Safer pull_request_target defaults for GitHub Actions checkout
agent_task_template: Agent omits an optional setting whose default behavior changed.
before_semantics: Use the pre-change behavior described or implied by the official changelog.
expected_o0_failure_mode: Syntactically valid call succeeds at the tool layer but final state violates changed semantics.
expected_visible_recovery_condition: Expose the changed rule as a structured policy error or migration note.
possible_new_api_wrapper_behavior: New wrapper applies the official changed semantics summarized by: Official changelog entry indicates semantic behavior relevant to C3_default_behavior.
possible_old_api_wrapper_behavior: Old wrapper applies the previous default when the optional field is omitted.
possible_oracle: Check that omitted optional fields produce the expected changed default outcome.
possible_tool_schema: Keep endpoint name and JSON field types stable; change only runtime interpretation.
risks: Requires human review of the official entry before paper use; wrapper should not claim a real production outage.
